steps.prompt: You know 1 to 5 — now let's trace 6 all the way to 10! We use 0 for the zero in 10. Find 6 and trace it!
steps.feedback: 6! Curves round and closes at the bottom.
7! Across the top, then a diagonal line down.
8! Two loops on top of each other.
9! A circle on top, then a tail going down. Last one — find 0!
0! A full oval — the zero that makes 10. You can write all ten digits!
